operator: a NOT BETWEEN b AND c
sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_array (id Int32, values Array(Float64), description String);
INSERT INTO test_array (id, values, description) VALUES (1, [1.5, NULL, 3.0, -1.0], 'Normal array');
INSERT INTO test_array (id, values, description) VALUES (2, [NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL], 'All NULLs');
INSERT INTO test_array (id, values, description) VALUES (3, [1.7976931348623157E+308, 1.7976931348623157E+308], 'Max float values');
INSERT INTO test_array (id, values, description) VALUES (4, [], 'Empty array');
SELECT id, arrayCumSum(values) AS cumulative_sum FROM test_array WHERE id NOT BETWEEN 1 AND 2;
SELECT id, arrayCumSum(values) AS cumulative_sum FROM test_array WHERE NOT (description LIKE 'All NULLs' AND arrayCumSum(values) NOT BETWEEN [0.0] AND [2.0]);
SELECT id, arrayCumSum(arrayMap(x -> CAST(x AS Float64), values)) AS cumulative_sum FROM test_array WHERE values NOT BETWEEN [1.0] AND [2.0];
SELECT id, arrayCumSum([sum(x) FOR x IN values]) AS cumulative_sum FROM test_array GROUP BY id HAVING cumulative_sum NOT BETWEEN 0 AND 10;
SELECT id, arrayCumSum(arrayJoin(values)) AS cumulative_sum FROM test_array WHERE id NOT BETWEEN 3 AND 4;
